name: widget-workshop
description: Agents and skills for Widget Workshop component development. Create, validate, review, and troubleshoot component packages, manifests, settings, Host API usage, permissions, and Workshop-ready metadata.

interface.shortDescription: Build and validate Widget Workshop components.
interface.longDescription: End-to-end component developer assistance for Widget Workshop: create package folders, write manifest and settings files, use window.widgetWorkshop safely, validate contracts, review permissions, and troubleshoot import or runtime failures.
defaultPrompt: Create a Widget Workshop component from this idea.
Validate this Widget Workshop component package.
Review these window.widgetWorkshop calls and permissions.
Debug this Widget Workshop import or runtime error.
